title: inula aurea
intro: Inula aurea, also known as Golden Samos or Golden Ragwort, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Inula aurea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Inula aurea can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
